P

playCard(Card) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
Attempts to play a card selected by the human player.
PlayController - Class in com.examplez.demo.Controller
FXML controller for the active card-game view (game-view.fxml).
PlayController() - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Controller.PlayController
 
Player - Class in com.examplez.demo.Model
Base representation of a participant in the card game.
Player(List<Card>, int) - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Model.Player
Creates a player with an initial hand and turn identifier.
PlayerHuman - Class in com.examplez.demo.Model
Human-controlled specialization of Player.
PlayerHuman(List<Card>, int) - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Model.PlayerHuman
Creates the human player with an initial hand and turn identifier.
PlayerMachine - Class in com.examplez.demo.Model
Automatically controlled specialization of Player.
PlayerMachine(List<Card>, int) - Constructor for class com.examplez.demo.Model.PlayerMachine
Creates a machine player with an initial hand and turn identifier.
processCardPlayedByHumanPlayer(String, int) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Processes a card selected by the human player, removes it from the hand, and draws a replacement card.
processCardPlayedByMachinePlayer(int) - Method in class com.examplez.demo.Model.Game
Selects and processes a valid card for a machine player.
